qso_entries.remarks: LU-1ZE reported from Argentina and Antarctica, using equipment from a research base. Charlie is operating from a small boat near a research base (Hotel Easy Roger Ocean Zero) and is returning to it due to a boat waiting at the dock.  They acknowledged W2PVF's signal.

session_summary: LU-1ZE reported from Argentina and Antarctica, operating from a small boat near a research base. They acknowledged contact with W2PVF and had to terminate the contact due to a boat waiting at the dock. The operator, Charlie, was using equipment provided by the Argentine Research Base.

dialogue.speaker: LU-1ZE
dialogue.text: LU-1ZE LU-1 Zebra Echo Here is New Jersey W2 Papa Victor

dialogue.speaker: W2PVF
dialogue.text: W2 Pampa Vector Foxtrot, have a copy.

dialogue.speaker: LU-1ZE
dialogue.text: Let me get that straight down. Uh, this is LU1. Zebra. It's gold. It's on.

dialogue.speaker: LU-1ZE
dialogue.text: Argentina and Antarctica returned. My name is Charlie, and my home call is with one.

dialogue.speaker: LU-1ZE
dialogue.text: a small small boat and I am using certain equipment courtesy of the Argentine Research Base here in Antarctica.

dialogue.speaker: LU-1ZE
dialogue.text: And I gotta get this knife down or I'll be in trouble. The name here is Charlie. Charlie.

dialogue.speaker: LU-1ZE
dialogue.text: There were many stations calling, but your signal reloaded everyone else.

dialogue.speaker: LU-1ZE
dialogue.text: Now, believe me, I do have to cut this short because the spur boat is waiting at the dock. I have to return to the research battle.

dialogue.speaker: LU-1ZE
dialogue.text: I spell it. Hotel Easy Roger Ocean Zero is the name of the research banco.

dialogue.speaker: LU-1ZE
dialogue.text: I am assigned to. But I couldn't resist giving you the call or answering your call. But to any other station that are on...
